title: MODELINV class.resolved Payload
description: Audit-event payload for a capability-class resolution decision. cycle-102 Sprint 1 (T1.4). Emitted by model-resolver on every class-addressed call (top-reasoning, top-non-reasoning, summarization, etc.). Captures the chosen model + the fallback chain considered, so audit-query can reconstruct routing decisions without rerunning the resolver. On cycle-detection failure, error_class=ROUTING_MISS + reason=cycle + cycle[] populated (per SDD line 705).

class_name.description: The capability class that was being resolved (e.g., top-reasoning).

outcome.description: Resolution outcome. RESOLVED: a primary model was chosen and probed AVAILABLE. FALLBACK: the primary failed probe, a fallback was chosen. FAILED: chain exhausted or cycle detected.

chosen_provider.description: Provider of the chosen model (RESOLVED or FALLBACK outcomes).

chosen_model.description: Model id of the chosen model (RESOLVED or FALLBACK outcomes).

primary_provider.description: The class's declared primary provider, before any fallback walk.

primary_model.description: The class's declared primary model, before any fallback walk.

fallback_chain_considered.description: Provider:model entries the resolver walked through (in order). Empty array if primary succeeded with no fallback walk.

probe_outcomes.description: Per-step probe outcome aligned with fallback_chain_considered (or singleton with primary). Used for triage when an unexpected model is chosen.

error_class.description: Populated when outcome=FAILED. Typed reason for the failure.

reason.description: Free-text triage hint. Used together with error_class. Example values: 'cycle' (when ROUTING_MISS due to cycle in fallback graph), 'no-models-meet-properties', 'all-providers-down'.

cycle.description: When reason=cycle, the visited-set that triggered cycle detection. Lets the auditor reconstruct the bad config without rerunning the resolver.

calling_primitive.description: Optional caller-context attribution per SDD section 4.4. Same semantics as model.invoke.complete.calling_primitive.
